phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tapestry museum is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el museo de tapices?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el moo-SEH-oh deh tah-PEE-sehs

likely_response.local: Baje a la cripta de la Seo, al
likely_response.pronunciation: BAH-heh AH LAH KREEP-tah DEH LAH SEH-oh AHL
likely_response.translation_en: In the crypt, going down the stairs.

responses.english: In the crypt, going down the stairs.
responses.phonetic: BAH-heh AH LAH KREEP-tah DEH LAH SEH-oh AHL
responses.french: Baje a la cripta de la Seo, al

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main chapel is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la capilla mayor?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah kah-PEE-yah mah-YOHR?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, detrás del altar principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHTRÁS DEHL ahl-TAHR preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, behind the main altar.

responses.english: At the back, behind the main altar.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHTRÁS DEHL ahl-TAHR preen-thee-PAHL
responses.french: Al fondo, detrás del altar principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy combined tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo comprar las entradas combinadas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh poo-EH-doh kom-PRAHR lahs en-TRAH-dahs kom-bee-NAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla principal, a la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the main ticket office, at the entrance.

responses.english: At the main ticket office, at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.french: En la taquilla principal, a la entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get the audio guide
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde consigo la audioguía en español?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh kon-SEE-goh lah ow-dee-oh-GEE-ah en es-pah-NYOL?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador de información, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH een-fohr-mah-thee-ÓN AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the information desk, on the right.

responses.english: At the information desk, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH een-fohr-mah-thee-ÓN AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En el mostrador de información, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the tower visit is open now
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿está abierta ahora la visita a la torre?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, es-TAH ah-BYEH-rah ah-OH-rah lah bee-SEE-tah ah lah TOH-rreh?

likely_response.translation_en: Check the sign at the entrance.

responses.english: Check the sign at the entrance.
